questions.question: Explain the main difference between a client-server and peer-to-peer file system architecture. Use the chapter 12.1 as reference.
questions.hint: Focus on the roles of clients and servers in each architecture

questions.question: What is the primary function of a file service in a distributed file system? Provide an example of how it can be implemented.
questions.hint: Focus on the file service's main responsibilities and a common implementation method

questions.question: Describe the process of file replication in a distributed file system. What are the benefits and challenges associated with it?
questions.hint: Use chapter 12.1 as reference and focus on the replication process, benefits, and challenges
